race.comment: I SHOW SPEED (7) came back 200m in trip with a commanding on-pace victory over 1080m at Canberra Acton with the 58kg. Gets a similar setup for this and can keep the momentum going in this tougher race. SUNRISE RIDGE (8) had excuses at her last two runs in Highway grade and has excellent figures on her home track. Will stalk the fast tempo and anywhere near her best can finish over the top of these. WINNING EMOTIONS (3) jumped in trip with a closing sixth over 1400m at Rosehill in Highway class. Finds a much weaker race and best form is over this trip. BIG OPINION (4) closed off well after the let-up with an eye-catching third over 1000m at Wagga in this grade. Maps well and is expected to go close.
